item.title: Septica - Android Game
item.description:
Septica is a card game that is popular in Romania. Now it is available on Android, so you can play it on your phone.

The game is played with a small deck of cards. The goal is to win tricks and collect points. It is usually played by two players, and it requires attention and memory.

This Android version lets you play Septica in a simple way. The interface is easy to understand, so you can start playing without difficulty.

item.title: Hello (Again), World!
item.description:
It’s been a while, but I’ve finally dusted off the digital shelves. After a long pause, I decided that a fresh start deserved a completely fresh workflow.

The new stack

I’m now using a modern, developer-centric workflow:

  • Hugo: The world’s fastest static site generator. It turns my Markdown files into a website in milliseconds.
  • GitHub Pages: No more server maintenance. My site is hosted directly from my repository, providing better security and performance without the “self-hosting” and wordpress headache.
  • Version Control: Every post is now just a git push away.
